overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk night market in a game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring heavy neon lighting, wet reflective streets, and Japanese-inspired architecture. The player walks from an outdoor entrance through a 24-hour shop into a covered market area with food stalls, ending at a garage-like space with motorcycles.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk street entrance with metal gate and neon signage

events.description: beginning at the metal gate entrance to the night market district

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy cyberpunk street toward the 24-hour shop entrance, passing pedestrians and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking across the path toward the shop entrance

entered.detail: tall metal gate structure with vertical bars marking the entrance
traditional Japanese red paper lantern with black characters
bright blue neon sign reading 24時間営業 (open 24 hours) above the entrance
steam rising from a vent on the wet pavement creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at the entrance to a cyberpunk night market, with a metal gate frame on the right and a glowing red paper lantern. The wet asphalt reflects the blue neon 24-hour sign ahead as the camera walks forward through light rain. Pedestrians in futuristic clothing walk through the scattered crowd, and steam rises from a vent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance to 24-hour market building with large doorway

events.description: passing through the large doorway from the outdoor street into the covered market interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the large industrial doorway into the 24-hour shop interior

notable_agents.action: person with green hair interacting with a terminal kiosk on the right wall

entered.detail: large industrial metal doorway marking the transition from outside to inside
covered interior space with visible market stalls and lighting beyond the entrance
digital terminal mounted on the wall with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the large industrial doorway into the semi-covered entrance area of the 24-hour market. The neon sign is now visible to the left as the space opens into the interior. A person with green hair stands at a terminal kiosk on the right, and the ground transitions from wet asphalt to concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market food stall area with vendor counters

events.description: approaching and passing the food stall counter with ceramic jar display

agents.ego_description: walking past the food stall area, observing the vendor and merchandise displays

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the counter arranging items on the display

entered.detail: long metal counter with warm overhead lighting displaying food items
large decorative ceramic jars arranged on the counter surface
long fluorescent tube lights illuminating the market corridor

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered market, the camera passes a food stall on the right with large ceramic jars displayed on the counter. A vendor stands behind the counter while overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the corridor. The space is fully enclosed with blue support pillars visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: market walkway with blue support pillars and distant stalls

events.description: moving past the food stall into the wider market corridor with blue pillars

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market corridor passing other shoppers and stalls

entered.detail: industrial blue metal support pillars lining the market walkway
covered market stalls with awnings on the left side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the food stall into a wider corridor lined with blue industrial support pillars. Market stalls with warm lighting are visible on the left, while the right side opens to more vendor spaces. The crowd density decreases as the camera progresses toward the distant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: chill-out lounge area with motorcycles and neon signage

events.description: approaching the CHILL-OUT area with parked motorcycles and green neon signage

agents.ego_description: approaching the CHILL-OUT lounge area with parked motorcycles and neon signage

notable_agents.action: person standing near the motorcycles in front of the CHILL-OUT sign

entered.detail: large green neon sign reading CHILL-OUT with decorative elements
several futuristic motorcycles parked in front of the lounge
tall illuminated vending machine with glowing selection interface

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the CHILL-OUT lounge area, marked by a prominent green neon sign. Several futuristic motorcycles are parked in the center space, and a vending machine glows on the right. The area has a garage-like atmosphere with a barber chair visible on the left as the camera moves toward the end of the market.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rainy outdoor street into the depths of a neon-lit, industrial night market. It begins at a metal gate under a glowing red lantern, moving through light rain across wet asphalt that reflects blue neon signs as steam rises from nearby vents. As the camera passes through a large industrial doorway, the environment shifts from the open street to a semi-covered entrance where the ground transitions to concrete and a green-haired figure stands at a terminal. The scene then moves deeper into a fully enclosed corridor, passing a food stall with ceramic jars under fluorescent lights before expanding into a wider walkway lined with blue industrial pillars and warm market stalls. Finally, the camera progresses toward a garage-like chill-out lounge, passing a glowing vending machine and a barber chair to arrive among several parked futuristic motorcycles under a prominent green neon sign.
